articles.title: Oldest Pearl Harbor survivor now lives in Massachusetts
articles.description:
At 106, he vividly recalls the day of the surprise bombing.

The post Oldest Pearl Harbor survivor now lives in Massachusetts appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: 106-year-old Pearl Harbor survivor now resides in Massachusetts, sharing his experiences.
He vividly recalls the December 7, 1941 bombing, impacting local history awareness.
His story fosters community remembrance and honors veterans in Boston.

articles.title: Concord man, 73, convicted of raping 20-year-old in Sandwich restaurant bathroom in 2023
articles.description:
A Barnstable County court said prior to sentencing the man that his actions were motivated by “a shocking sense of entitlement.”

The post Concord man, 73, convicted of raping 20-year-old in Sandwich restaurant bathroom in 2023 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Concord man, 73, convicted of raping a 20-year-old in Sandwich restaurant bathroom.
Barnstable County court highlighted the man's actions stemmed from a 'shocking sense of entitlement.'
This conviction raises concerns about safety in local dining establishments for Boston residents.
